# STARTER_UI_STRUCTURE_CRITIQUE

Use this starter for **UI Structure Critique**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/lite_routes/rt_ui_structure_critique.md`
- `dist/lite_contracts/ui_structure_critique.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/ui-system-expert.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/grid-system-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/type-system-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/accessibility-feedback-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Prefer this route when the user wants structural diagnosis before polish.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1444 words / ~1921 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_UI.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for UI Structure Critique. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
